problem id: 4b52b575
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10100001 -> 10000000
  10100100 -> 00000010
  01011101 -> 10000100
  10000110 -> 00000000
  01000011 -> 10000000
  00111101 -> 10000010
  00110100 -> 00000010

query: 01101011
predicted answer: 10000100
